sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47279" key="h(mi/spondos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-σπονδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n47279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half bound by treaty</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
